executives.name: Bonn Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith has over 15 years of experience in the capital markets and has been involved in the management and financing of several public companies. He has served as a director and officer of various resource companies.

executives.name: Sead Hamzagic
executives.background: Mr. Hamzagic is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in public practice and financial management. He has served as CFO for several public companies in the resource sector.

board_of_directors.name: Bonn Smith
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Smith has over 15 years of experience in the capital markets and has been involved in the management and financing of several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Emerson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Emerson has over 30 years of experience in the resource sector, specializing in corporate finance and management. He has been a director and officer of numerous public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Jack Bal
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bal has over 25 years of experience in the capital markets and has served as a director and officer of several public companies in the resource and technology sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Whittaker
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Whittaker has over 30 years of experience in the resource sector, including senior management roles in exploration and development companies.

sources.source_description: GoldHaven Resources Corp. Official Website - Management & Directors Page
